dashboard.label: Asset Health Correlation
dashboard.description: Enrich your data with ping health status - correlate endpoint availability with other Splunk data sources

search.query: | inputlookup ping_monitor_settings_lookup | where _key="global" | head 1 | eval index=coalesce(index, "ping"), sourcetype=coalesce(sourcetype, "ping_monitor"), metrics_index=coalesce(metrics_index, "ping_metrics")

panel.title: Current Asset Health Status (from Ping Monitor)

search.query: index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | stats latest(_time) as last_check, latest(packet_loss_pct) as packet_loss, latest(avg_latency_ms) as latency, values(target_ip) as ip_addresses, values(group) as groups, values(entitytype) as entitytype, values(device) as device, values(vendor) as vendor by hostname | eval health_status = case( packet_loss == 0, "Healthy", packet_loss > 0 AND packet_loss < 50, "Degraded", packet_loss >= 50 AND packet_loss < 100, "Critical", packet_loss == 100, "Down", true(), "Unknown" ) | eval health_icon = case( health_status == "Healthy", "✅", health_status == "Degraded", "⚠️", health_status == "Critical", "🔶", health_status == "Down", "❌", true(), "❓" ) | eval last_check_human = strftime(last_check, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval latency_display = if(latency > 0, round(latency, 2)." ms", "N/A") | table health_icon, hostname, ip_addresses, health_status, packet_loss, latency_display, groups, entitytype, device, vendor, last_check_human | rename health_icon as " ", packet_loss as "Packet Loss %", latency_display as "Latency", last_check_human as "Last Check" | sort health_status, hostname

index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | stats latest(packet_loss_pct) as packet_loss by hostname | eval health_status = case( packet_loss == 0, "Healthy", packet_loss > 0 AND packet_loss < 50, "Degraded", packet_loss >= 50 AND packet_loss < 100, "Critical", packet_loss == 100, "Down", true(), "Unknown" ) | stats count by health_status

index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | eval health_status = case( packet_loss_pct == 0, "Healthy", packet_loss_pct > 0 AND packet_loss_pct < 50, "Degraded", packet_loss_pct >= 50 AND packet_loss_pct < 100, "Critical", packet_loss_pct == 100, "Down", true(), "Unknown" ) | timechart span=1h count by health_status

html.p: Assets currently experiencing issues that may affect related services

search.query: index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary packet_loss_pct>0 | stats latest(packet_loss_pct) as packet_loss, latest(avg_latency_ms) as latency, values(target_ip) as ips, values(group) as groups, values(entitytype) as entitytype by hostname | eval health_status = case( packet_loss > 0 AND packet_loss < 50, "Degraded", packet_loss >= 50 AND packet_loss < 100, "Critical", packet_loss == 100, "Down" ) | eval health_icon = case( health_status == "Degraded", "⚠️", health_status == "Critical", "🔶", health_status == "Down", "❌" ) | table health_icon, hostname, ips, health_status, packet_loss, latency, groups, entitytype | rename health_icon as " ", packet_loss as "Loss %", latency as "Latency ms" | sort -packet_loss

panel.title: Service Impact Analysis by Entity Type

html.p: Groups assets by entity type and shows overall service health

search.query: index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | stats latest(packet_loss_pct) as packet_loss, dc(hostname) as total_assets, values(hostname) as assets by entitytype, group | eval healthy = if(packet_loss == 0, 1, 0) | eventstats sum(healthy) as healthy_assets, count as total by entitytype | eval service_health_pct = round((healthy_assets / total) * 100, 1) | eval service_status = case( service_health_pct >= 99, "✅ Excellent", service_health_pct >= 90, "🟢 Good", service_health_pct >= 75, "⚠️ Degraded", service_health_pct >= 50, "🔶 Impaired", true(), "❌ Critical" ) | stats values(group) as groups, sum(total_assets) as total_assets, avg(service_health_pct) as avg_health, values(service_status) as status by entitytype | eval avg_health = round(avg_health, 1)."%" | table entitytype, groups, total_assets, avg_health, status | rename entitytype as "Entity Type", groups as "Groups", total_assets as "Total Assets", avg_health as "Health %", status as "Service Status" | sort -avg_health

div.p: To enable real-time health enrichment across all your searches, run the following search to generate a lookup table:
div.pre: index=$pm_index$ sourcetype=$pm_sourcetype$ record_type=summary | stats latest(packet_loss_pct) as packet_loss_pct, latest(avg_latency_ms) as avg_latency_ms, values(target_ip) as target_ip, values(group) as group, values(entitytype) as entitytype by hostname | eval health_status = case( packet_loss_pct == 0, "Healthy", packet_loss_pct > 0 AND packet_loss_pct < 50, "Degraded", packet_loss_pct >= 50 AND packet_loss_pct < 100, "Critical", packet_loss_pct == 100, "Down", true(), "Unknown" ) | outputlookup ping_health_lookup.csv
div.p: The saved search "Ping Monitor - Update Health Lookup" does this automatically every 5 minutes. Enable it in Settings > Saved Searches.
